title: Xtra Vietnamese Rice Bowl
description: A grassy, cheese-pull quick-fix Vietnamese dish featuring yogurt and low-glycemic cauliflower rice.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat and sauté the cauliflower rice for 3 minutes until slightly tender.
Add the grilled chicken slices to the skillet and toss to combine, cooking for an additional 2 minutes to heat through.
Remove skillet from heat and stir in the shredded cheddar until it melts into a creamy coating over the rice and chicken.
In a small bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, lime juice, fish sauce, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour the yogurt sauce over the hot rice mixture, stirring to coat evenly and keep the cheese slightly pulled.
Transfer the bowl to a serving dish, then sprinkle with scallions, cilantro, toasted sesame seeds, and a few extra crumbs of cheese.
Garnish with a squeeze of fresh lime and a drizzle of sesame oil for extra flavor.
Serve immediately while hot for a fresh, low-glycemic Vietnamese rice bowl.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
